ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., guest, registered, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Windows, macOS, iOS, Android) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is interacting */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used during the session */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform on which the session occurred */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of interaction */,
  "interaction_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction (e.g., Click, Move) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buttons" (
  "button_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each button */,
  "button_name" TEXT /* Name of the button (e.g., NoButton, LeftClick) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the button */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("button_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state (e.g., Move, Click) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of interaction */,
  "button_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the button involved in the interaction */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the interaction */,
  "x_position" INTEGER /* X-axis position of the cursor */,
  "y_position" INTEGER /* Y-axis position of the cursor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional event data (e.g., click target, keystrokes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_button_id FOREIGN KEY ("button_id") REFERENCES buttons ("button_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cursor_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cursor position record */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction for which the position is recorded */,
  "x_position" INTEGER /* X-axis position of the cursor */,
  "y_position" INTEGER /* Y-axis position of the cursor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cursor position was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cursor_positions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES user_interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Login, Logout, Click) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the event occurred */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the event occurred */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional event data (e.g., login credentials, error messages) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_views" (
  "page_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page view */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the page view occurred */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page viewed */,
  "referrer_url" TEXT /* URL of the referrer page */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the page view occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_interactions" (
  "page_interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page interaction */,
  "page_view_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the page view in which the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of interaction */,
  "button_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the button involved in the interaction */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the interaction */,
  "x_position" INTEGER /* X-axis position of the cursor */,
  "y_position" INTEGER /* Y-axis position of the cursor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_interactions_button_id FOREIGN KEY ("button_id") REFERENCES buttons ("button_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_interactions_page_view_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_view_id") REFERENCES page_views ("page_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_interactions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_segments" (
  "session_segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session segment */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the segment occurred */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the segment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_segments_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heatmap_data" (
  "heatmap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heatmap data point */,
  "page_view_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the page view in which the interaction occurred */,
  "x_position" INTEGER /* X-axis position of the cursor */,
  "y_position" INTEGER /* Y-axis position of the cursor */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Number of clicks at this position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heatmap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heatmap_data_page_view_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_view_id") REFERENCES page_views ("page_view_id")
)
